description: Style NoteMilitary styling on a nike backpack - a combo that just can't go wrong! Epitomising toughness, this bag is as hard wearing as it looks. Product DetailsMilitary style upper with a polyester body and nylon liningA zippered compartment on the front and one concealed compartment under the flapOne main compartment with a zippered pocket and organiser slots insideA padded backPadded, adjustable shoulder straps with a click lock styling to join the twoWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and CarePolyester, nylonWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust SizeHeight: 51 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 16 cm
